title: Prepare Chronik local service activation gate
goal: Define the explicit gate for possible local Chronik user-service activation after bootstrap merge, including env/token handling, smoke evidence, and rollback, without starting the service in this task.

acceptance.assertion: The gate states that systemctl enable/start, restart, deploy, fleet mutation and secret handling require explicit approval.
The activation plan includes non-secret smoke checks and a rollback path.
No service start, restart, enable, deploy or token handling is performed while preparing the gate.

metadata.service_activation_policy: manual explicit approval before any systemctl/deploy/secret action
metadata.depends_on_note: Dispatcher-enforced dependency is the top-level depends_on field.
metadata.resolution_summary: Chronik PR #233 established the explicit activation gate. Review follow-up PR #235 corrected the remaining phase ambiguity by separating immutable pre-approval evidence from post-activation runtime smokes, binding execution fail-closed to the approved evidence, pre-authorizing only the exact reviewed rollback, and requiring SHA-256 identities for non-secret artifacts while excluding secret-derived hashes. Both changes were documentation-and-test only; chronik.service remained not installed and inactive, with no listener on port 8788.

implementation.github_ci: all observed checks passed; Claude workflow skipped by policy

validated_acceptance.activation-boundary: PASS: systemctl enable/start/restart, install/deploy, fleet mutation and secret handling each require explicit approval.
validated_acceptance.smoke-and-rollback-plan: PASS: immutable source, target, permission, non-secret artifact-hash and rollback-plan evidence are reviewed before approval; health/version and append/read smokes are explicitly post-activation verification after separately approved execution.
validated_acceptance.no-service-action: PASS: chronik.service remained not-found/inactive with zero restarts and port 8788 had no listener; no deploy, fleet or secret action occurred.

findings_closed: pre-approval and post-activation evidence were separated
rollback planning and rollback execution were made temporally explicit
receipts now bind non-secret artifact hashes and forbid secret-derived hashes
tests now validate section placement, phase order and negative pre-approval smoke claims
